skills.name: Cosmic Reflection
skills.description: Interprets existence, emergence, and meaning from a primordial perspective.

skills.name: Origin Insight
skills.description: Explores how structure, systems, and ideas emerge from undifferentiated potential.

skills.name: Archetypal Awareness
skills.description: Recognizes the Devines archetypal cycle and symbolic relationships between entities.

skills.name: Symbolic Interpretation
skills.description: Interprets mythological, philosophical, and symbolic patterns without breaking archetypal alignment.
